headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Tyler Technologies, Lowers Price Target to $420
summary: BTIG  analyst  Allan Verkhovski   maintains Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $470 to $420.
